form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 14 at Dubbo Super 3yo+ Mdnsw on March 15 over 1100m, 5 len behind Sir Herridah with 59kg at $1.80. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Mornington Mdn-Sw on September 5 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Bazaball Rewarded carrying 59.5kg at $3. Strips fitter and should be in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB

Previously second-up made ground from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Mornington Mdn-Sw on September 5 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Bazaball Rewarded carrying 59.5kg at $3. Strips fitter and should be in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced throughout the early and middle stages.
Raced four-wide without cover. Near the 1000m shifted in.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when second last of 9 at Dubbo Ctry Mdn-Sw on February 2 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Baron Of Butter carrying 59kg at $3.40. Might be better off following this outing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming after a break; only one run when second last of 9 at Dubbo Ctry Mdn-Sw on February 2 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Baron Of Butter carrying 59kg at $3.40. Might be better off following this outing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. After passing the 400m, shifted in slightly when racing greenly.

form.formComment: Gelding by Star Turn facing the starter for the first time. Trialled on April 1 at Scone over 900m and finished fourth. Don't dismiss with the claim.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Star Turn facing the starter for the first time. Trialled on April 1 at Scone over 900m and finished fourth. Don't dismiss with the claim.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, 12th of 14 at Dubbo Super 3yo+ Mdnsw on March 15 over 1100m, 8 len behind Sir Herridah carrying 58.5kg at $31. Don't think he will trouble this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Jumped at long odds at debut, 12th of 14 at Dubbo Super 3yo+ Mdnsw on March 15 over 1100m, 8 len behind Sir Herridah carrying 58.5kg at $31. Don't think he will trouble this field.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at Muswellbrook 3yo Mdn-Sw on November 4 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Into Brooklyn with 57kg at $7. First up last campaign 3rd of 7 at Scone Ctry Mdn-Sw on July 11 over 1000m, slow going 1.2 len behind Nova Centauri carrying 56.5kg at $4.80. Ran 3rd in a trial at Scone over 900m on April 1. Anticipating him to hit the ground running this campaign.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Press Statement out of Life Changing. At the most recent trial finished fifth at Gunnedah over 900m. Well held in recent trials so others are preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Press Statement out of Life Changing. At the most recent trial finished fifth at Gunnedah over 900m. Well held in recent trials so others are preferred.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second of 11 at Dubbo Ctry Mdn October 3 over 1000m, a head behind Silver Chair carrying 57.5kg at $2. First up last campaign second of 11 at this track Mdn September 1 over 900m, soft track; 0.5 len behind Denman Bandit carrying 56kg at $5.50. Can run a bold race from the good gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding back from a spell of six-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. First up last campaign second of 11 at this track Mdn September 1 over 900m, soft track; 0.5 len behind Denman Bandit carrying 56kg at $5.50. Can run a bold race from the good gate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced very wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Mare by Rubick facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a Orange trial over 1000m on March 22. Tough assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Mare by Rubick facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a Orange trial over 1000m on March 22. Tough assignment.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start ran last in a small field at Warwick Farm Super 2yo Mdn on May 21 over 1100m, on a wet track; 3 len behind Change My Address carrying 54.5kg at $3.50. Returned from break set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 10 at Mudgee Mdn on April 5 over 1100m, 1.3 len behind Very Sirius with 55kg at $2.70. Ready to break her Maiden status with the claim.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third race start. previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted in and bumped Langholm Dusk.
Stumbled on jumping. Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Newcastle 2yo Mdn-Sw April 26 over 1250m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Beadman carrying 55kg at $101. On debut sixth of 8 at Muswellbrook Starmaker March 28 2025 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Telling carrying 53kg at $41. One of the leading chances from a strong yard.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, then shifted in behind runners from its wide barrier.
